blurb: The Royal United Services Institute (RUSI) is an independent UK think tank producing evidence-based research on defence, security and international affairs, including AI policy.
notes: BLOCKED: rusi.org is a Gatsby single-page app. web_fetch (readability) returned only the publications category index (Commentary, Insights Papers, Research Papers, etc.) with no datable article entries. curl of the listing and of /feed, /feed.xml, /sitemap.xml, /sitemap_index.xml returned the JS shell (only nav links and inline SVG world-map markup), no real RSS or article URLs with dates. No individual dated/attributed AI publications could be harvested without JS rendering. Empty arrays per protocol.
